nodes.speaker: Tabitha
nodes.text: The walls are breathing again. Not much. Just enough.

choices.text: Keep breathing. Tell me what changed.

nodes.speaker: Tabitha
nodes.text: A narrow one. Fresh cut stone. Someone wanted it forgotten.

nodes.speaker: Tabitha
nodes.text: It stopped when I listened. That is the part I do not like.

nodes.speaker: Tabitha
nodes.text: Then we do not go there alone.

nodes.speaker: Tabitha
nodes.text: If the house starts humming, leave the room. I mean that literally.
